age.long_description: Age group, based on age in current years.

epic_n_diarrhea.short_description: Number of ED encounters with all-cause diarrhea diagnoses.
epic_n_diarrhea.long_description: Number of emergency department encounters with all-cause diarrhea ICD-10-CM codes (A00-A09, R19.7), monthly. Data from Epic Cosmos, which contains de-identified data from 300M+ patients across 1,600+ hospitals. Counts fewer than 10 are suppressed and imputed as 5. The weekly equivalent is epic_n_ed_diarrhea.

epic_pct_diarrhea.long_name: All-Cause Diarrhea Emergency Room (ER) Encounters (%, Monthly)
epic_pct_diarrhea.short_description: Percentage of ED encounters attributable to all-cause diarrhea.
epic_pct_diarrhea.long_description: Percentage of emergency department encounters attributable to all-cause diarrhea ICD-10-CM codes (A00-A09, R19.7), calculated as the count divided by total all-cause ED encounters for the same geography, age, and month. The weekly equivalent is epic_pct_ed_diarrhea.

epic_n_all_encounters_monthly.long_name: Total Monthly Emergency Department Encounters (All Causes)
epic_n_all_encounters_monthly.short_description: Total number of monthly emergency department encounters for any cause.
epic_n_all_encounters_monthly.long_description: Total count of monthly emergency department encounters for any cause, used as the denominator for the all-cause diarrhea percentage. Data from Epic Cosmos, which contains de-identified data from 300M+ patients across 1,600+ hospitals. Counts fewer than 10 are suppressed and imputed as 5. The weekly equivalent is epic_n_ed_encounters_weekly.

epic_suppressed_flag_diarrhea.long_name: Suppression flag: fewer than 10 all-cause diarrhea ED encounters in the strata (monthly)
epic_suppressed_flag_diarrhea.short_description: Binary indicator: 1 if the diarrhea ED encounter count was suppressed, 0 otherwise.
epic_suppressed_flag_diarrhea.long_description: Binary indicator: 1 if fewer than 10 all-cause diarrhea emergency department encounters in the strata, 0 otherwise. When suppressed, the corresponding count (epic_n_diarrhea) is imputed as 5.

epic_suppressed_flag_all_encounters_mont.long_name: Suppression flag: fewer than 10 all-cause monthly ED encounters in the strata
epic_suppressed_flag_all_encounters_mont.short_description: Binary indicator: 1 if the all-cause monthly ED encounter count was suppressed, 0 otherwise.
epic_suppressed_flag_all_encounters_mont.long_description: Binary indicator: 1 if fewer than 10 all-cause monthly emergency department encounters in the strata, 0 otherwise. When suppressed, the corresponding count (epic_n_all_encounters_monthly) is imputed as 5.

epic_n_ed_diarrhea.short_description: Number of ED encounters with all-cause diarrhea diagnoses, weekly.
epic_n_ed_diarrhea.long_description: Number of emergency department encounters with all-cause diarrhea ICD-10-CM codes (A00-A09, R19.7), weekly. Data from Epic Cosmos, which contains de-identified data from 300M+ patients across 1,600+ hospitals. Counts fewer than 10 are suppressed and imputed as 5. Named with an 'ed_' prefix to distinguish it from epic_n_all_diarrhea, which covers all encounter types (not ED-specific) in the same file.

epic_pct_ed_diarrhea.long_name: All-Cause Diarrhea Emergency Room (ER) Encounters (%, Weekly)
epic_pct_ed_diarrhea.short_description: Percentage of ED encounters attributable to all-cause diarrhea, weekly.
epic_pct_ed_diarrhea.long_description: Percentage of emergency department encounters attributable to all-cause diarrhea ICD-10-CM codes (A00-A09, R19.7), calculated as epic_n_ed_diarrhea divided by epic_n_ed_encounters_weekly for the same geography, age, and week.

epic_n_ed_encounters_weekly.long_name: Total Weekly Emergency Department Encounters (All Causes)
epic_n_ed_encounters_weekly.short_description: Total number of weekly emergency department encounters for any cause.
epic_n_ed_encounters_weekly.long_description: Total count of weekly emergency department encounters for any cause, used as the denominator for epic_pct_ed_diarrhea. Data from Epic Cosmos, which contains de-identified data from 300M+ patients across 1,600+ hospitals. Counts fewer than 10 are suppressed and imputed as 5. Distinct from epic_n_encounters_total_weekly, which counts encounters of any type (not just ED).

epic_suppressed_flag_ed_diarrhea.long_name: Suppression flag: fewer than 10 all-cause diarrhea ED encounters in the strata (weekly)
epic_suppressed_flag_ed_diarrhea.short_description: Binary indicator: 1 if the weekly diarrhea ED encounter count was suppressed, 0 otherwise.
epic_suppressed_flag_ed_diarrhea.long_description: Binary indicator: 1 if fewer than 10 all-cause diarrhea emergency department encounters in the strata, 0 otherwise. When suppressed, the corresponding count (epic_n_ed_diarrhea) is imputed as 5.

epic_suppressed_flag_ed_encounters_weekl.long_name: Suppression flag: fewer than 10 all-cause weekly ED encounters in the strata
epic_suppressed_flag_ed_encounters_weekl.short_description: Binary indicator: 1 if the all-cause weekly ED encounter count was suppressed, 0 otherwise.
epic_suppressed_flag_ed_encounters_weekl.long_description: Binary indicator: 1 if fewer than 10 all-cause weekly emergency department encounters in the strata, 0 otherwise. When suppressed, the corresponding count (epic_n_ed_encounters_weekly) is imputed as 5.

epic_n_cyclospora_positive.long_name: Encounters with an Abnormal (Positive) Cyclospora Lab Result
epic_n_cyclospora_positive.short_description: Number of encounters with an abnormal (positive) cyclospora lab result.
epic_n_cyclospora_positive.long_description: Number of encounters with an abnormal (positive) cyclospora lab test result, by state, weekly or monthly. Data from Epic Cosmos, which contains de-identified data from 300M+ patients across 1,600+ hospitals. Counts fewer than 10 are suppressed and imputed as 5. Note: this measure has no age breakdown and is not restricted to emergency department encounters.

epic_n_cyclospora_tested.long_name: Encounters with a Cyclospora Lab Test Performed
epic_n_cyclospora_tested.short_description: Number of encounters with a cyclospora lab test performed, regardless of result.
epic_n_cyclospora_tested.long_description: Number of encounters with a cyclospora lab test performed (any result), by state, weekly or monthly. Used as the denominator for the percent-positive measure. Data from Epic Cosmos, which contains de-identified data from 300M+ patients across 1,600+ hospitals. Counts fewer than 10 are suppressed and imputed as 5. Note: this measure has no age breakdown and is not restricted to emergency department encounters.

epic_n_encounters_total.short_description: Total number of encounters for any reason, by state and month.
epic_n_encounters_total.long_description: Total count of encounters for any reason (not restricted to the emergency department), used as the population denominator for the cyclospora testing rate. Data from Epic Cosmos, which contains de-identified data from 300M+ patients across 1,600+ hospitals. Counts fewer than 10 are suppressed and imputed as 5.

epic_pct_cyclospora_positive.long_name: Percent of Cyclospora Lab Tests that were Positive
epic_pct_cyclospora_positive.short_description: Percent of cyclospora lab tests with an abnormal (positive) result.
epic_pct_cyclospora_positive.long_description: Percentage of cyclospora lab tests returning an abnormal (positive) result, calculated as epic_n_cyclospora_positive divided by epic_n_cyclospora_tested for the same geography and time period.

epic_pct_cyclospora_tested.long_name: Percent of All Encounters with a Cyclospora Lab Test Performed
epic_pct_cyclospora_tested.short_description: Percent of all encounters that included a cyclospora lab test.
epic_pct_cyclospora_tested.long_description: Percentage of all encounters (any reason) that included a cyclospora lab test, calculated as epic_n_cyclospora_tested divided by the total-encounters denominator for the same geography and time period (epic_n_encounters_total for the monthly file, epic_n_encounters_total_weekly for the weekly file).

epic_suppressed_flag_cyclospora_positive.long_name: Suppression flag: fewer than 10 cyclospora-positive encounters in the strata
epic_suppressed_flag_cyclospora_positive.short_description: Binary indicator: 1 if the cyclospora-positive encounter count was suppressed, 0 otherwise.
epic_suppressed_flag_cyclospora_positive.long_description: Binary indicator: 1 if fewer than 10 cyclospora-positive encounters in the strata, 0 otherwise. When suppressed, the corresponding count (epic_n_cyclospora_positive) is imputed as 5.

epic_suppressed_flag_cyclospora_tested.long_name: Suppression flag: fewer than 10 cyclospora-tested encounters in the strata
epic_suppressed_flag_cyclospora_tested.short_description: Binary indicator: 1 if the cyclospora-tested encounter count was suppressed, 0 otherwise.
epic_suppressed_flag_cyclospora_tested.long_description: Binary indicator: 1 if fewer than 10 encounters with a cyclospora lab test in the strata, 0 otherwise. When suppressed, the corresponding count (epic_n_cyclospora_tested) is imputed as 5.

epic_suppressed_flag_encounters_total.long_name: Suppression flag: fewer than 10 total monthly encounters in the strata
epic_suppressed_flag_encounters_total.short_description: Binary indicator: 1 if the total monthly encounter count was suppressed, 0 otherwise.
epic_suppressed_flag_encounters_total.long_description: Binary indicator: 1 if fewer than 10 total encounters (any reason) in the strata, 0 otherwise. When suppressed, the corresponding count (epic_n_encounters_total) is imputed as 5.

epic_n_all_diarrhea.long_name: All-Cause Diarrhea Encounters, Any Encounter Type
epic_n_all_diarrhea.short_description: Number of encounters (any type, not just ED) with all-cause diarrhea diagnoses.
epic_n_all_diarrhea.long_description: Number of encounters, of any type (not restricted to the emergency department), with all-cause diarrhea ICD-10-CM codes (A00-A09, R19.7), weekly. Appears with an age breakdown in weekly.csv.gz and at the state-total level (no age) in weekly_tests.csv.gz. Data from Epic Cosmos, which contains de-identified data from 300M+ patients across 1,600+ hospitals. Counts fewer than 10 are suppressed and imputed as 5.

epic_pct_all_diarrhea.long_name: All-Cause Diarrhea Encounters (%), Any Encounter Type
epic_pct_all_diarrhea.short_description: Percentage of all encounters (any type) attributable to all-cause diarrhea.
epic_pct_all_diarrhea.long_description: Percentage of encounters of any type (not restricted to the emergency department) attributable to all-cause diarrhea ICD-10-CM codes (A00-A09, R19.7), calculated as epic_n_all_diarrhea divided by epic_n_encounters_total_weekly for the same geography, week, and (in weekly.csv.gz) age.

epic_n_encounters_total_weekly.long_name: Total Weekly Encounters for Any Reason
epic_n_encounters_total_weekly.short_description: Total number of weekly encounters for any reason.
epic_n_encounters_total_weekly.long_description: Total count of weekly encounters for any reason (not restricted to the emergency department), used as the population denominator for both epic_pct_all_diarrhea and epic_pct_cyclospora_tested. Appears with an age breakdown in weekly.csv.gz and at the state-total level (no age) in weekly_tests.csv.gz; sources agree exactly where they overlap (same state and week). Data from Epic Cosmos, which contains de-identified data from 300M+ patients across 1,600+ hospitals. Counts fewer than 10 are suppressed and imputed as 5.

epic_suppressed_flag_all_diarrhea.long_name: Suppression flag: fewer than 10 all-cause diarrhea encounters (any type) in the strata
epic_suppressed_flag_all_diarrhea.short_description: Binary indicator: 1 if the all-encounters diarrhea count was suppressed, 0 otherwise.
epic_suppressed_flag_all_diarrhea.long_description: Binary indicator: 1 if fewer than 10 all-cause diarrhea encounters (any encounter type) in the strata, 0 otherwise. When suppressed, the corresponding count (epic_n_all_diarrhea) is imputed as 5.

epic_suppressed_flag_encounters_total_we.long_name: Suppression flag: fewer than 10 total weekly encounters in the strata
epic_suppressed_flag_encounters_total_we.short_description: Binary indicator: 1 if the total weekly encounter count was suppressed, 0 otherwise.
epic_suppressed_flag_encounters_total_we.long_description: Binary indicator: 1 if fewer than 10 total weekly encounters (any reason) in the strata, 0 otherwise. When suppressed, the corresponding count (epic_n_encounters_total_weekly) is imputed as 5.

epic_cosmos.name: Epic Cosmos
epic_cosmos.description: Epic Cosmos is a collaborative research platform containing de-identified patient data from over 300 million patients across more than 1,600 hospitals and health systems using Epic electronic health record systems. Data is accessed via SlicerDicer, a self-service analytics tool. The dataset includes emergency department visits, diagnoses, immunizations, laboratory results, and other clinical data. Due to privacy protections, counts fewer than 10 are suppressed and imputed. Coverage extends across all U.S. states and territories. Note that county-level and city-level stratifications could differ markedly in total sample size due to high levels of missingness of county data in some states.
epic_cosmos.restrictions: The data can be re-used with appropriate attribution. A suggested citation relating to this data is 'Results of research performed with Epic Cosmos were obtained from the PopHIVE platform (https://github.com/PopHIVE/Ingest).'
